topic_text: When Every hour at from Date & Time, do Zap using PAVLOK. Re-focus on high priority tasks by zapping me every 30 minutes. Sometimes, I need a little zap to get me on the right tasks

When Sleep duration below from Fitbit, do Quick add event using Google Calendar. Get a reminder to get more sleep when FitBit records too little.. There are lots of ways to do this, but using Google Calendar allows me to get a notification the following evening when it actually helps Note: Be careful modifying the "Quick add to Google Calendar" field - it's really easy to get 4h37m of sleep and then accidentally have Google schedule your next reminder for 4:37 AM the next morning! If you put your desired reminder time at the beginning, it should prevent this.
